scripts.build:check: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- assets/build/admin-config.js assets/build/admin-config.asset.php assets/build/block-panel.js assets/build/block-panel.asset.php
scripts.check:phase1: npm run build:check && npm run audit:ajax
scripts.check:phase2: npm run check:phase1 && npm run test:js-runtime
scripts.wp-env:setup:multisite: node tools/wp-env-multisite.js run cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/tests/fixtures/wp-env/bin/setup.php
scripts.wp-env:legacy-ajax:off:multisite: node tools/wp-env-multisite.js run cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/tests/fixtures/wp-env/bin/disable-legacy-ajax.php
scripts.wp-env:legacy-ajax:on:multisite: node tools/wp-env-multisite.js run cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/tests/fixtures/wp-env/bin/enable-legacy-ajax.php
scripts.test:e2e:rest-only:multisite:run: cross-env LERM_ADMIN_CONFIG_REST_ONLY=1 LERM_ADMIN_CONFIG_MULTISITE=1 LERM_ADMIN_CONFIG_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8890 playwright test tests/E2E/network-mode.spec.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run test:integration:run
scripts.test:integration:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:wait:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run test:integration:multisite:run
scripts.test:e2e:block-editor: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run wp-env:block-editor:on && npm run test:e2e:block-editor:run && npm run wp-env:block-editor:off
scripts.test:e2e: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:wait:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run test:e2e:multisite:run
scripts.test:e2e:rest-only: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run wp-env:legacy-ajax:off && npm run test:e2e:rest-only:run && npm run wp-env:legacy-ajax:on
scripts.test:e2e:rest-only:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:wait:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run wp-env:legacy-ajax:off:multisite && npm run test:e2e:rest-only:multisite:run && npm run wp-env:legacy-ajax:on:multisite
scripts.test:wp: npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:wp:multisite: npm run test:integration:multisite && npm run test:e2e:multisite
scripts.test:wp:rest-only: npm run test:e2e:rest-only && npm run test:e2e:rest-only:multisite
